name: ICU MEDICAL INC/DE
summary: PART I First person pronouns used in this Annual Report on Form 10-K, such as we, us, and our, refer to ICU Medical, Inc. (ICU) and its subsidiaries unless context requires otherwise. Company Background and Overview of Business ICU develops, manufactures and sells innovative medical products used in infusion therapy, vascular access, and vital care applications.
